Give.heroTitle: Partner with Purpose: Ignite Transformation Together!
Give.heroBody: When you give, you help us steward a sacred online space for healing, deliverance, and spiritual growth. Your partnership extends hope, disciples believers, and carries the ministry forward in faith and love.
Give.whySubtitle: Three ways your generosity multiplies in the kingdom—and in people's lives.
Give.w1Desc: Your generosity helps us share the gospel of healing and deliverance with those who need it most—online and around the world.
Give.w2Desc: Partners strengthen our fellowship: prayer, teaching, and encouragement that unite believers across every border.
Give.w3Desc: Every gift equips resources, outreach, and care so people can grow in faith and walk in lasting freedom.
Give.waysSubtitle: Choose the rhythm of giving that fits your heart and capacity.
Give.p1Desc: Make a single contribution today and plant a seed toward spiritual transformation and practical ministry impact.
Give.p2Desc: Join as a monthly partner for steady support that sustains teaching, community, and pastoral care all year long.
Give.p3Desc: Designate your giving toward initiatives such as events, outreach, or resource development as announced by the ministry.
Give.bankDesc: Transfer directly to our ministry account
Give.seedNote: Every dollar you contribute is a seed sown into the fertile ground of spiritual transformation...

Events.title: Events Coming Soon
Events.description: We're preparing transformative events and workshops designed to deepen your connection with the divine. Stay tuned!
Events.programsSubtitle: Choose a program below for schedule details, where to watch, and how to reach us for prayer.

Blog.title: Blog
Blog.subtitle: Teachings, stories, and encouragement from our community. Read, reflect, and share the journey of faith and healing.
Blog.tryDifferent: Try a different search or clear the filter.
Blog.checkBack: Check back soon for new articles.
Blog.postMoved: This article may have been moved or is no longer available.
Blog.likeError: Could not update like. Try again.

Contact.pageSubtitle: We'd love to hear from you. Send a message and our team will respond as soon as we can.
Contact.formDesc: Fill out the form below and we'll be in touch.
Contact.name: Name
Contact.subject: Subject
Contact.toastSuccess: Thank you! We'll get back to you soon.
Contact.toastError: Could not send your message. Please try again later.

PrayerRequest.title: Prayer Request
PrayerRequest.subtitle: You are not alone. Share your heart with us—we believe in the power of prayer and the comfort of community standing with you in faith.
PrayerRequest.gateTitle: Sign in to share a prayer request
PrayerRequest.gateDesc: Prayer requests are shared with our team in confidence. Please sign in or create an account so we can serve you well.
PrayerRequest.submitError: We couldn't submit your request. Please try again.
PrayerRequest.thanksDesc: Your request has been received. Our team and community will lift you up in prayer. May you know peace, strength, and the nearness of God today.
PrayerRequest.verse: “Do not be anxious about anything, but in every situation, by prayer and petition, with thanksgiving, present your requests to God.”
PrayerRequest.formDesc: Your details are handled with care. Email is optional if you prefer to remain more private.
PrayerRequest.emailPlaceholder: For a reply, if you wish
PrayerRequest.requestPlaceholder: Share what's on your heart—we're praying with you.

Auth.loginSubtitle: Sign in to your Ministry of Healing and Deliverance account
Auth.lockout: Too many failed attempts. Try again in {minutes} min, or
Auth.verifyWarning: Your email is not verified. We've sent a new verification link — please check your inbox.
Auth.tooManyLockout: Too many failed attempts. Try again in {minutes} minutes, or reset your password.

errors.userNotFound: No account found for this email.
errors.tooManyRequests: Too many attempts. Please try again later.
errors.popupClosed: Sign-in was cancelled. Please try again.
errors.unauthorizedDomain: This domain is not authorized for sign-in. Please contact the administrator.
errors.generic: Something went wrong. Please try again.

Auth.signupSubtitle: Create your account for the Ministry of Healing and Deliverance
Auth.verifyDesc: We've sent a verification link to {email}. Please click the link to confirm your account.
Auth.verifyHint: Once verified you can sign in and access your dashboard.
Auth.accountCreated: Account created! Please check your email to verify your address.

signupErrors.emailInUse: An account already exists with this email.
signupErrors.invalidEmail: Please enter a valid email address.

Auth.forgotSubtitle: Enter your email and we'll send you a reset link.
Auth.checkEmailDesc: If an account exists for that email, we've sent a password reset link. Check your inbox and spam folder.
Auth.resetGeneric: If an account exists for that email, a reset link has been sent.
